DeepSeek

About DeepSeek

DeepSeek is a ai chatbots platform founded in 2023. It positions itself as “Chinese AI chatbot excelling at coding and mathematical reasoning” and is best suited for coding, math, reasoning, technical tasks. Pricing starts at Free, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Web SearchYes
File UploadYes
Code ExecutionYes
Image GenerationNo
Voice InputNo
PluginsNo
Api AccessYes
MemoryNo
MultilingualYes
CitationsNo

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Exceptional coding and math capabilities
  • Completely free to use
  • Open-source models available

Cons

  • Censored on sensitive topics
  • Slower response times during peak usage
  • Privacy concerns with Chinese data handling
